alt_text: An equation-style diagram: 'نفس ناطقہ' (Rational Soul) equals 'صورت' (Form) plus 'علمی' (Theoretical) plus 'عملی' (Practical) — defining the rational soul as the sum of form and its two operational faculties.
notes: Equation-style teaching aid. Decorative flower glyphs (❀) bracket the equation. Pairs with image 002 which gives the equation for the sensible soul.
